title: RetryBudget
description: Declared local-recovery limit (FR-005). Exhaustion routes to escalation; the budget is carried on the ToolCall so replay is deterministic.

backoff_seconds.description: Backoff schedule per retry attempt, e.g. [0, 1, 3]. Must have length max_attempts.

retry_on.description: errorCategory values that are eligible for local retry. 'validation' typically absent.
